title: Spare Change
description: A simple coins mod to use on your servers!
body:
![Banner with mod name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff573cea22532c6b37c8f779eea84fa0278c5d47.png)
![bar](https://i.imgur.com/oQTWzMm.png)
**INFO:** Spare Change is a very basic mod adding five tiers of coins to the game: Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Netherite. Crafting each tier of coin is simple and by placing 9 of a single type of coin together in a Crafting Table, you can craft a Coin Crate, making it much easier to store your coins. This mod was made with servers in mind and does not have any use outside of a multiplayer setting.

See Coin Recipes:
